During the requested remand: Pursuant to RCFC 52.2(b)(1)(C), the Clerk of Court is directed to STAY all proceedings in this matter until further order of the Court. Pursuant to RCFC 52.2(b)(1)(D), the defendant shall FILE a status report on or before February 17, 2026, and every 30 days thereafter, during the remand period. Pursuant to RCFC 52.2(e)(1), within 30 days of the filing of the ABCMR&039;s final decision on remand, the parties shall FILE a joint status report with the Court setting forth the parties&039; position(s) regarding whether further litigation of this matter is necessary.
